label: Request Approval
description: Create an approval request and pause this monday.com automation until a human approves or rejects. Use the callback URL from a monday.com webhook to resume your automation after the decision.

parameters.name: title
parameters.label: What needs approval?
parameters.help: A short description of what you want approved (e.g. 'Send invoice #1234 to client'). If left blank, you can edit the title in your OKRunit dashboard at okrunit.com.

parameters.name: description
parameters.label: Details
parameters.help: Additional context for the reviewer (optional). Use dynamic data from previous modules.

parameters.name: callback_url
parameters.label: Callback URL
parameters.help: To receive the approval decision: 1) Create a second automation with the OKRunit 'Approval Decision Received' trigger. 2) Copy the webhook URL it generates. 3) Paste it here. When someone approves or rejects, OKRunit will POST the decision to that URL and your second automation will continue automatically.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.label: Metadata (JSON)
parameters.help: Optional JSON data to attach (e.g. {"board_id": "123", "item_id": "456"}). Routing rules, priority, expiration, and approvers are all configured in your OKRunit dashboard at okrunit.com.
